pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 8 to Java 11 to support the new runtime environment.
Set Kotlin compiler JVM target to 11 to ensure bytecode compatibility with the new JDK version.
Switch from direct Quarkus BOM import to the Quarkus Universe Platform BOM for better dependency management in Quarkus 2.0.
Upgrade the Quarkus framework version to 2.0.2.Final to access new features and Java 11 support.

.dockerignore.general_idea: Include the Quarkus application directory structure required for the runner image in Quarkus 2.0.
